name: King Gold And Pawn
description_short: King Gold and Pawn operates 7 NYC locations offering cash loans and purchases for gold, jewelry, watches, diamonds, and collectibles with free appraisals and no credit checks.
description_long:
King Gold and Pawn is a pawn shop network with seven locations across New York City specializing in precious metals and collectibles. The company provides customers with collateral-based cash loans and direct purchase options for items of value, positioning itself as a quick-access cash solution for those needing immediate funds.

The company's core services include pawn loans (where customers retain ownership of items), direct sales of gold and valuables, and free professional appraisals. They accept gold jewelry, fine watches, sterling silver, silver flatware, coins, and estate/antique jewelry. Loan amounts range from $1 to $50,000, with the company emphasizing low interest rates and straightforward repayment policies. All transactions reportedly require no credit checks and minimal paperwork.

King Gold and Pawn distinguishes itself through claimed competitive pricing ("top dollar" buying), staff with over a decade of appraisal experience at each location, and transparent fee structures. The website prominently displays real-time precious metal spot prices (gold, silver, platinum), suggesting they align loan offers with market conditions. The multiple NYC locations provide convenience, and their pawn model appeals to those wanting to retain ownership of sentimental or valuable items while accessing cash.

However, the website provides minimal specifics on actual interest rates, exact fees, repayment terms, or regulatory compliance details. While they claim "low interest rates," no rates are disclosed, making cost comparison difficult. The company's legitimacy appears reasonable given the detailed service descriptions and professional presentation, but prospective customers should independently verify rates and terms before committing.
pros: 7 convenient NYC locations across the city for easy access
Real-time precious metal pricing displayed on website (gold, silver, platinum spot prices)
No credit checks required—enables access for those with poor credit
Loan amounts up to $50,000 available in a single transaction
Free appraisals for all items—no commitment required to learn item value
Pawn model allows customers to retain ownership of sentimental items while getting cash
Staff claimed to have over a decade of appraisal experience at each location
cons: No specific interest rates or APRs disclosed on website—makes cost comparison impossible
Repayment terms, loan duration, and exact fee structures not clearly detailed
Limited information on what happens if loan is not repaid (redemption period, item sale timeline)
No regulatory compliance information, licensing details, or third-party certifications visible
Reliance on item resale value means loan amounts may be significantly below appraised value
best_for: People needing cash immediately and willing to use personal valuables as collateral
Those with poor credit who want to avoid traditional lenders and credit checks
Individuals wanting to temporarily leverage jewelry or watches while retaining ownership
diagnosis: King Gold and Pawn is best for NYC residents with valuable jewelry, watches, or precious metals who need immediate cash without credit checks and prefer retaining ownership of their items. The main caveat is that the company discloses no specific interest rates, fees, or repayment terms on their website, making it impossible to assess true borrowing costs before visiting a location in person.
services: Pawn loans with customer ownership retention
Direct purchase of gold and precious metals at market rates
Free appraisals of gold, jewelry, watches, and collectibles
Purchase of fine watches and timepieces
Purchase of sterling silver jewelry and flatware
Purchase of silver and gold coins
Purchase of estate and antique jewelry
Cash loans up to $50,000 on collateral
Fast cash loans without credit verification
